OLD VINTAGES

Give a wine from your child's birth year

A vintage for every milestone

Maison Rouge carefully preserves aged vintages, oak barrel-aged wines stored in our cellars in Saint-Pierre-de-Clages. These Valais treasures are waiting for a special occasion to be gifted.

Birth of a child

Give a wine from your child's birth year and open it together on their 18th birthday. A unique gift that stands the test of time.

Wedding

Mark your union with a vintage from the year you met or married. Perfect for celebrating your anniversaries.

Corporate event

Celebrate your company's founding year or a milestone anniversary with a historic Valais vintage.

Our available vintages

Exceptional aged wines, preserved in our cellars since their vinification

No vintages currently available.

Contact us for enquiries about specific vintages.

Why our wines age beautifully

The art of ageing and preservation

Oak barrel ageing

Our reserve wines are aged for 3 to 5 years in oak barrels, developing complex aromas and a remarkable tannic structure.

Noble Valais grape varieties

Cornalin, Merlot, Syrah, Petite Arvine: exceptional grape varieties cultivated on our 18 hectares between Sierre and Leytron, using organic farming.

10 to 20 years ageing potential

Thanks to our ageing methods and the quality of our terroirs, some vintages reach their peak after 10 to 20 years of cellaring.

Historic cellars

Our cellars in Saint-Pierre-de-Clages offer ideal temperature and humidity conditions for preserving our old vintages.

Imagine...

Imagine opening a bottle of Cornalin 2006 with your son on his 18th birthday. Imagine the wonder in your daughter's eyes as she discovers a wine born the same year she was.

Each bottle tells a story: that of a unique vintage, an exceptional Valais terroir, and soon... yours.

These wines have been raised with patience and passion by the Maison Rouge team. They are waiting for the perfect moment to reveal their full splendour.

Reserve your vintage

Contact us to reserve your birth year wine or to enquire about availability. Our aged vintages are in limited supply.
